title: Nrusinghanath Temple
tagline: Nrusinghanath Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Nrusinghanath Temple, is a Hindu temple in Western Odisha, India, situated at the foothills of Gandhamardhan hills near Paikmal, Bargarh.
overview.description: Nrusinghanath Temple, is a Hindu temple in Western Odisha, India, situated at the foothills of Gandhamardhan hills near Paikmal, Bargarh. The King of Patna, Baijal Singh Dev laid the foundation of this historic temple in early 15th century CE. It is only 45 feet in height, divided into two parts: the first being the seat of the Lord Nrusinghnath, the second allotted to Jagamohan (antechamber having 3 gates and each supported by 4 pillars.

topPlaces.name: Paikmal
topPlaces.description: Paikmal is a town and Block Head Quarter in Bargarh district of Odisha state in eastern India. The location is famous for Nrusinghanath Temple.

topPlaces.name: Gandhamardan Hills
topPlaces.description: Gandhamardan Hills or Gandhamardan Parbat 1060m(Odia: ଗନ୍ଧମାର୍ଦନ ପର୍ବତ) is a hill located in between Balangir and Bargarh district of Odisha, India. This hill is well known for medicinal plants.

topPlaces.name: Harishankar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sri Sri Harisankar Devasthana is a temple on the slopes of Gandhamardhan hills, Bolangir District of Odisha in India. It is popular for its scenes of nature and connection to two Hindu lords, Vishnu and Shiva.

items.note: Paikmal is a town and Block Head Quarter in Bargarh district of Odisha state in eastern India. The location is famous for Nrusinghanath Temple.
Gandhamardan Hills or Gandhamardan Parbat 1060m(Odia: ଗନ୍ଧମାର୍ଦନ ପର୍ବତ) is a hill located in between Balangir and Bargarh district of Odisha, India. This hill is well known for medicinal plants.

Sri Sri Harisankar Devasthana is a temple on the slopes of Gandhamardhan hills, Bolangir District of Odisha in India. It is popular for its scenes of nature and connection to two Hindu lords, Vishnu and Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nrusinghanath Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nrusinghanath Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nrusinghanath Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (117 km) and the nearest railway station is Raipur Junction (130 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nrusinghanath Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nrusinghanath Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nrusinghanath Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nrusinghanath Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nrusinghanath Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Paikmal, Gandhamardan Hills, Harishankar Temple.
